metadata.description: Claude Code skill plugins by Andrii Derkach — Go review tooling and more

plugins.name: google-go-styleguide
plugins.description: Three skills for reviewing Go code against Google's Go Style Guide framework (Style Guide, Style Decisions, Best Practices). Each runs as a parallel fan-out of subagents focused on one rule (or section) at a time. Explicit-only invocation.

plugins.name: go-proverbs-review
plugins.description: A skill for reviewing Go code against Rob Pike's 19 Go Proverbs. Runs as a parallel fan-out of subagents, one per actionable proverb. Activates on explicit request or whenever the user asks to review .go files.

plugins.name: uber-go-styleguide
plugins.description: A skill for reviewing Go code against Uber's Go Style Guide — 59 rules across Guidelines, Performance, Style, Patterns, and Linting. Rule content is copied verbatim from uber-go/guide (Apache 2.0, pinned commit). Runs as a per-section parallel fan-out of 5 subagents. Explicit-only invocation.

plugins.name: validation-architecture-review
plugins.description: An opinionated skill for reviewing Go code against validation best practices in clean / onion / hexagonal architecture. 7 rules (5 actionable, 1 tooling, 1 philosophical) covering layer placement, value objects, struct separation, error kinds, cross-aggregate rules, schema wiring, and defence-in-depth. Parallel per-rule subagent fan-out. Explicit-only invocation; review-only (never applies fixes).
